Video.summary: All of your favorite trucks and drivers race at Ford Field on March 6, 2014.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: For the first time ever in Texas, the most extreme Monster Trucks compete for the freestyle win at Reliant Stadium in Houston, TX.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Coming to you from Vikings Country, all the freestyle action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 8, 2007!
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Everything is bigger in Texas and now so are the trucks! Monster Jam crashes NRG Stadium in Houston.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 9 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: All the Monster Jam action is back at Carrier Dome in Syracuse, NY during the 2019 Championship Series!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Join the packed crowd at the RCA Dome in Indianapolis, IN, as your favorite trucks and drivers compete in freestyle action.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: A sold out, jam-packed stadium watches on as the stars of Monster Jam compete with racing action from the Edwards Jones Dome on February 25, 2006.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: The RCA Dome in Indianapolis comes alive as Monster Jam freestyle takes center stage.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: The East Series continues with racing, wheelies and freestyle.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam's East Championship Series continues in Louisiana!
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: Indianapolis is the home of motor sports and tonight, the roof of the RCA Dome will be raised as Monster Jam trucks compete in freestyle action. Will one man stand alone as champion? Find out now!
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the LIVE racing action from AT&T Stadium on February 28, 2014.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Epic freestyle action takes center stage at the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: All the racing action from Ford Field on January 17, 2009.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Brodozer, the first diesel-powered machine to hit the competition, makes its debut in Nashville!
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: Don't miss exciting freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals 7 on March 25, 2006.
Video.title: World Finals VII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals VII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals VII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals VII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues at the Ball Arena in Denver, CO.
Video.title: Ball Arena - Denver, CO

Video.summary: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Check out this epic compilation of Grave Digger's best moments - featuring drivers Tyler Menninga, Krysten Anderson, and more over the years!
Video.title: Best of Grave Digger

Video.summary: April's 2025 Points Series was INSANE! We've got the definitive recap of the absolute BEST freestyle moments and the most thrilling racing wins. You won't want to miss this!
Video.title: Best Of 2025 Racing And Freestyle Wins

Image.alt: Best Of 2025 Racing And Freestyle Wins
Best Of 2025 Racing And Freestyle Wins
Best Of 2025 Racing And Freestyle Wins

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime visits Glendale, AZ for Round 11 of Stadium Championship East.
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh, PA for round 9 of Arena in 30.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: The intensity reaches a fever pitch at the Save Mart Center as Fresno hosts Round 10 of the Arena Championship Series West. Experience a masterclass in technical driving as the 2025 Arena Racer of the Year, Blake Granger, attempts a historic sweep of the night's competitions. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. Witness heart-stopping "nose wheelies," backflips, and "moonwalks" in an action-packed event that culminates in an electric Freestyle finale.
Video.title: Save Mart Center - Fresno, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Sofi Stadium in Englewood, CA.
Video.title: Sofi Stadium - Englewood, CA

Video.summary: El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez leads the charge as Arena Championship Series West heads to the Golden 1 Center in Sacramento, California. Lainez will need to hold off Earth Shaker’s Tristan England who looks to reclaim the top spot in the series points standings.
Video.title: Golden 1 Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: Northern Tool’s Tools for the Trades™ program and Monster Jam® partnered to inspire the next generation of tradespeople. Bryan, TX high school students, led by instructor Chris Lehde and Monster Jam mentors Colt Stephens, Armando Castro, Matt DelSanter, and Bill Easterly, were challenged to build a mini Monster Jam truck using a 740cc EFI NorthStar engine and raw steel. The project aimed to spark interest in skilled trades through hands-on experience and monster-sized inspiration.
Video.grandparentTitle: Northern Tool and Equipment Tools for the Trades
Video.title: Monster Jam Mini Build
